commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh I saw by night, and behold a man riding upon a red horse, and he stood among the myrtle trees that were in the hollow; and behind him there were red, speckled, and white horses. An angel in the shape of a man. It was probably St. Michael, the guardian angel of the Church of God. (Challoner) It is plain that he was an angel, ver. (Worthington) He appears in obscurity, to show the distress of the nation. (Calmet) Among. Septuagint, "between two shady mountains.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: A man: An angel in the shape of a man. It was probably Michael, the guardian angel of the church of God.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
